name: Chicken Provencale
recipeInstructions:
1. Debone the chicken and remove the skin.
2. Heat butter and oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Sauté the chicken on both sides until browned. Remove from the pan.
4. In the same skillet, sauté onions and celery for about 5 minutes.
5. Blend in flour; slowly add water mixed with dissolved chicken bouillon.
6. Add the can of whole tomatoes and stir until the mixture comes to a boil.
7. Season with salt and pepper.
8. Return the chicken to the pan, add sherry and parsley.
9. Cover and simmer for about 30 minutes until tender.
